versionNote: DJR Buyer-Routing Matrix v6 — Hot Capital Ranked. Fuses matrix UW profiles (Parts 4/4B/4C/4D/4E) + Part 17 Hot Capital Deployment Ranking + Part 12 Exec Web + Part 13 Pitch Angle Library + Part 15 Fund Mandate Calendar. Designed for Quick Lookup runtime consumption.

tierDefinitions.TIER_1_HOT_CAPITAL: Peak deployment pressure · fresh fund or capital event <12mo · stretch-the-box mode · PITCH FIRST
tierDefinitions.TIER_2_ACTIVE: Active buyer with clear capital · selective but responsive
tierDefinitions.TIER_4_SELECTIVE: Disciplined cherry-picker OR tight geographic/product box
tierDefinitions.TIER_5_HYPER_LOCAL: Family operator OR regional specialist OR single-state
tierDefinitions.DO_NOT_ROUTE: Not an acquirer OR defunct OR out of sector OR unverified
